creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
Adam, thank you for mentioning this.  I have opened a VuXML pull request for the most severe vulnerability at https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/158.

I note that this port's maintainer, swills@, has not made any commits since 2022-03-13 so I suspect someone else will need to update the port.
